message:
Add CheckAgentSupervision precheck and fix NaN-safe comparison

- plan/mod.rs: Add PreCheck::CheckAgentSupervision to kill, restart, pause,
  throttle, freeze, unfreeze, and quarantine actions to verify target process
  is not a supervised coding agent before taking action; add tests verifying
  kill and pause actions include the new precheck
- supervision/environ.rs: Replace unwrap() with unwrap_or(Ordering::Equal) in
  confidence comparison to handle potential NaN values safely, preventing
  panic on malformed confidence scores

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
